example_prompt: Create a structured order with line items in Bictorys to track purchases before or alongside payment.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for the order. Example: "XOF", "GNF".

orderDetails.description: Line items of the order. At least one item is required.

taxRate.description: Tax rate applied to this item (as a percentage, e.g. 18 for 18%).

discount.description: Discount amount applied to this item.

customerId.description: UUID of the customer placing the order. Optional — links the order to a known customer profile.

amount.description: Override total order amount. If omitted, Bictorys calculates from orderDetails (price × quantity − discount + tax).

deliveryCharges.description: Additional delivery or shipping fees added to the order total.

deductedAmount.description: Amount deducted from the total (e.g. a voucher or loyalty credit).

deviceId.description: Point-of-sale or app device identifier for the order.

subTotalAmount.description: Sum of (price × quantity) for all line items before taxes and discounts.

totalTax.description: Total tax amount computed from line item taxRate values.

finalAmount.description: Total amount due: subTotal + totalTax + deliveryCharges − deductedAmount.

gotchas: This endpoint uses the order-management microservice. The base URL is https://api.bictorys.com/order-management/v1 — not https://api.bictorys.com/pay/v1. Using the wrong base URL returns 404.
orderDetails is required and must contain at least one item. Each item requires name, price, and quantity.

finalAmount is computed by Bictorys as: sum(price × quantity) + totalTax + deliveryCharges − deductedAmount. You can override the total by passing amount explicitly — otherwise trust Bictorys's calculation.
create_order does NOT trigger a payment. It creates an order record. To charge the customer, call create_charge or create_invoice separately and link by reference.
Sandbox base URL is https://api.test.bictorys.com — the production URL is https://api.bictorys.com.
